description: Authentication flows via Better Auth OAuth (Google + GitHub), session lifecycle, and route protection.

workflows.name: Unauthenticated root redirect
steps: Clear all cookies and localStorage.
Navigate to /.
Verify redirect to /sign-in.

workflows.name: Authenticated root redirect
steps: Navigate to / (session is auto-provided by E2E bypass).
Verify redirect to /editor.

workflows.name: Sign-in page renders both OAuth buttons
steps: Navigate to /sign-in.
Verify heading 'Sign in' is visible.
Verify a button named 'Continue with Google' is visible.
Verify a button named 'Continue with GitHub' is visible.

workflows.name: Protected route redirects to sign-in with callback
steps: Clear all cookies.
Navigate to /editor.
Verify redirect to /sign-in.
Verify the URL query string contains callbackUrl=%2Feditor or callbackUrl=/editor.

workflows.name: Callback URL is preserved on sign-in page
steps: Navigate to /sign-in?callbackUrl=/editor.
Verify the sign-in page renders with heading 'Sign in'.
Verify the URL still contains the callbackUrl parameter.

workflows.name: Malicious callback URL is sanitized server-side
steps: Navigate to /sign-in?callbackUrl=//evil.com.
Verify the sign-in page renders with heading 'Sign in' (not redirected to evil.com).
Verify both OAuth buttons are visible.

Note: the browser URL still shows the raw query param, but the server-side getSafeCallbackUrl() converts '//evil.com' to '/editor' before passing it to the sign-in form. The OAuth buttons will redirect to /editor, not evil.com.

workflows.name: Already authenticated user skips sign-in form
steps: Navigate to /sign-in (session is auto-provided by E2E bypass).
Verify redirect to /editor without showing the sign-in form.

workflows.name: Sign out button is wired and calls the auth API
steps: Navigate to /editor.
Click the Timer chip in the top-right to open the sprint menu.
Click the 'Sign out' button at the bottom of the sprint menu.
Verify a POST request is sent to /api/auth (sign-out endpoint).

Note: with E2E bypass ON, the sign-in page detects the fake session and redirects back to /editor. Full redirect-to-sign-in verification requires a real session (E2E bypass OFF + OAuth or email/password auth).

workflows.name: Stale session cookie triggers re-auth
steps: Set an invalid better-auth.session_token cookie (domain: 127.0.0.1, path: /).
Navigate to /editor.
Verify redirect to /sign-in.
Verify the URL contains callbackUrl.
Verify heading 'Sign in' is visible.
